items.title: Is the A320 Milestone a Sign of Further Gains for Airbus in 2025?
items.description: If you have been following Airbus lately, you know it is not just another stalwart in the aerospace industry. It is a company steadily grabbing headlines and breaking records. Investors eyeing Airbus stock have enjoyed a handsome ride. The share price recently closed at 203.3, notching up gains of 0.4% over the last week, 5.2% for the month, and a remarkable 27.0% year-to-date. Stretching back even further, the stock has soared 53.1% in the past year and a stunning 225.0% over five years...

items.title: Europe's Airline Crisis: Boeing and Airbus Delays Wreak Havoc on Jet Deliveries
items.description: Seven-year certification holdups and a U.S. shutdown are grounding expansion plans at major European carriers.

items.title: Boeing Third-Quarter Deliveries Rise, Orders Drop Annually
items.description: Boeing (BA) on Tuesday posted a year-over-year gain in third-quarter deliveries, led by the 737 Max

items.title: Boeing Inks $3 Bil Patriot Missile-Tech Deal, Stock Consolidates
items.description: Boeing stock, up 21% this year, received a modest boost Tuesday from a deal to supply critical Patriot missile components.

items.title: Jim Cramer Believes “Boeing’s a Must Buy”
items.description: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer commented on. During the episode, when a caller asked about the company, Cramer commented: “I think Boeing’s a must buy. I think Boeing’s a must buy. I have looked the CEO in the eye.
